attributes.name: Adventure Scenario Card Definition
attributes.summary: AdventureScenario is a catalog component designed to define and represent adventure scenarios in a narrative or game setting. It include fields for key identifiers, titles, descriptions, and flexible tags for narrative style or visual hints. The component offers multiple visual formats—isolated, embedded, and fitted—to display scenario summaries with varying levels of detail and styling, facilitating both detailed presentation and compact inline summaries. Its primary purpose is to enable structured, styled, and versatile presentation of adventure scenarios for storytelling, game design, or scenario planning contexts.
